title: Associate Data Analyst
description:
Notion powers workspaces for 100M+ people globally. We've reinvented how teams organize, plan, and execute work—from solopreneurs to Fortune 500 companies.

We're seeking a Associate Data Analyst to join our Productivity team in Kansas City. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Extract and clean datasets from multiple sources using SQL and Python
Build visualizations and dashboards to communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders
Support senior analysts with exploratory data analysis and hypothesis testing
Document data processes and maintain data dictionaries for team reference
Identify data quality issues and collaborate on resolution strategies
Assist with ad-hoc reporting requests and maintain recurring analytics

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of analytics experience or recent graduate with strong quantitative background
